service inventory, workload ports, policy targetRefs, and multi-cluster gateway signals may be unavailable

deployment workload posture may be unavailable
standalone ReplicaSet workload posture may be unavailable
StatefulSet workload posture may be unavailable

findings.title: Mesh-managed workloads must have resolved authorization coverage
findings.reasoning: Control MG-AUTHZ-001 could not be evaluated for omg-strict/strict-api: authorization.effective unavailable: AuthorizationPolicy resources unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Apply an AuthorizationPolicy that selects this workload and inspect the resolution chain to confirm its effective scope.

findings.title: Workloads should resolve to default deny with explicit allow
findings.reasoning: Control MG-AUTHZ-002 could not be evaluated for omg-strict/strict-api: authorization.effective unavailable: AuthorizationPolicy resources unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Establish an empty ALLOW policy for default deny and add narrowly scoped ALLOW rules for required traffic.

findings.title: Authorization policies must not grant structurally broad access
findings.reasoning: Control MG-AUTHZ-003 could not be evaluated for omg-strict/strict-api: authorization.effective unavailable: AuthorizationPolicy resources unavailable; authorization.broadAllow unavailable: authorization broad-allow evidence unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Replace empty rules and wildcard principals or namespaces with the narrow identities and operations the workload requires.

findings.unknownReason: authorization.effective unavailable: AuthorizationPolicy resources unavailable; authorization.broadAllow unavailable: authorization broad-allow evidence unavailable

findings.title: Authorization access must be scoped to explicit identities
findings.reasoning: Control MG-AUTHZ-004 could not be evaluated for omg-strict/strict-api: authorization.effective unavailable: AuthorizationPolicy resources unavailable; authorization.broadAllow unavailable: authorization broad-allow evidence unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Scope ALLOW rules to approved principals, namespaces, service accounts, or workload identities.

findings.unknownReason: authorization.effective unavailable: AuthorizationPolicy resources unavailable; authorization.broadAllow unavailable: authorization broad-allow evidence unavailable

findings.title: Authorization coverage must resolve at workload level
findings.reasoning: Control MG-AUTHZ-005 could not be evaluated for omg-strict/strict-api: authorization.effective unavailable: AuthorizationPolicy resources unavailable; authorization.policiesInScope unavailable: AuthorizationPolicy resources unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Correct policy namespace, selector, or targetRefs so coverage reaches this workload rather than relying on policy resource presence alone.

findings.unknownReason: authorization.effective unavailable: AuthorizationPolicy resources unavailable; authorization.policiesInScope unavailable: AuthorizationPolicy resources unavailable

findings.title: Ambient L7 authorization must be enforced by a waypoint
findings.reasoning: Control MG-AUTHZ-006 could not be evaluated for omg-strict/strict-api: authorization.effective unavailable: AuthorizationPolicy resources unavailable; authorization.l7Unenforced unavailable: AuthorizationPolicy resources unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Attach the L7 policy with targetRefs and select a ready waypoint whose scope includes the workload.

findings.unknownReason: authorization.effective unavailable: AuthorizationPolicy resources unavailable; authorization.l7Unenforced unavailable: AuthorizationPolicy resources unavailable

findings.title: L7 authorization without an enforcement path must be reported
findings.reasoning: Control MG-AUTHZ-007 could not be evaluated for omg-strict/strict-api: authorization.effective unavailable: AuthorizationPolicy resources unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Provision or repair the selected waypoint and confirm that policy targetRefs attach through that enforcement path.

findings.title: Mesh-managed workloads must resolve to strict mTLS
findings.reasoning: Control MG-MTLS-001 could not be evaluated for omg-strict/strict-api: mtls.effective unavailable: PeerAuthentication resources unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Apply or correct PeerAuthentication so the workload resolves to STRICT, then inspect the attached resolution chain.

findings.title: Declared workload ports must resolve to strict mTLS
findings.reasoning: Control MG-MTLS-002 could not be evaluated for omg-strict/strict-api: mtls.byPort unavailable: workload ports unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Correct workload-level port mTLS overrides so every declared, Service-bound workload port resolves to STRICT.

findings.title: Workloads must never resolve to globally disabled mTLS
findings.reasoning: Control MG-MTLS-003 could not be evaluated for omg-strict/strict-api: mtls.effective unavailable: PeerAuthentication resources unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Apply or correct PeerAuthentication so the workload no longer resolves to DISABLE, then inspect the attached resolution chain.

findings.title: Client TLS must agree with resolved server mTLS
findings.reasoning: Control MG-MTLS-007 could not be evaluated for omg-strict/strict-api: mtls.clientTLSContradiction unavailable: DestinationRule collection unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Correct DestinationRule TLS mode or the server-side PeerAuthentication posture so client and server settings agree.
